title: Nested Data Merging
scenario: Given two nested JSON objects representing customer information, merge the data into a single object. The output should be a JSON object with the merged data in the format {'name': 'John Doe', 'address': {'street': '123 Main St', 'city': 'Anytown', 'state': 'CA', 'zip': '12345'}, 'email': 'john.doe@example.com'}.
constraints: Must be a valid JSON object
Each field value should be in the correct data type

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the output is a valid JSON object.
Check if the data is correctly merged.
Verify that each field value is in the correct data type.
